title: Broadcom donates Velero to CNCF — and it could reshape how Kubernetes users handle backup and disaster recovery
author: B. Cameron Gain
zh_title: 博通捐赠 Velero 给 CNCF：或将重塑 Kubernetes 备份与灾难恢复
zh_summary: Broadcom 将 Velero 捐赠给 CNCF，解决 Kubernetes 备份与灾难恢复痛点。Velero 将由社区中立治理，强化数据保护与迁移，巩固 Broadcom 云原生地位。
